stemHtml: In an EFIS equipped aircraft, the V1 speed reference is the...

options.a: rotation speed and is normally indicated on the airspeed indicator tape on the Primary Flight Display.
options.b: take-off decision speed and is normally indicated on the airspeed indicator tape on the Primary Flight Display.
options.c: take-off decision speed and is normally indicated on the vertical speed indicator tape on the Navigation Display.
options.d: take-off safety speed and is normally indicated on the airspeed indicator tape on the Primary Flight Display.
